title: ProjectUpdater editing, goals, references, and open-folder actions
description: Operator reported ProjectUpdater cannot edit/delete projects, change/add goals, store a folder/reference for visiting the project, or open the project folder. Implement these project-management operations in the offline single-file app without adding a backend, shell command generation, clipboard command flow, or breaking existing localStorage data.
acceptance_criteria: Projects can be edited after creation, including name, area, goal, next action, status, priority, progress, reminder window, due date, and reference folder/path
Projects can be deleted with confirmation, removing related notes according to documented behavior
Users can add/change multiple project goals or goal entries without losing existing single-goal localStorage data
Project cards expose visit/open-folder actions using bounded local/offline behavior appropriate for a static app
Validator/manual checks cover edit/delete/goal/reference/open-folder behavior and existing add/note/filter persistence still passes
